title: MacroPulse Alert
message:
FOMC Jul 29: hike odds ~50%, up from ~15% Mon — Warsh dismisses transitory excuse; oil above $100
Trump tells Axios he's 'close' to massive Iran attack — new escalation beyond tanker strikes
BTC ETF: 7-day inflow streak, $981M cumulative since Jul 14 (up from 5-day/$600M)
